title: Dynamic Theming Boss
description: Boss challenge: Build a complete dark/light theme system using CSS custom properties with component-scoped overrides and dynamic calculations
html:
Theme System

Pro

This component demonstrates a full theme system using CSS custom properties.

Dark Theme

Pro

Same component, different theme - powered by CSS variables.
starterCss:
/* Build a theme system:
   Light theme: white bg, dark text, blue primary
   Dark theme: dark bg, light text, cyan primary
   The meter should use calc() with --progress variable
   Badge and buttons should reference theme variables */

validationRules.message: Light theme title should be dark text
Dark theme should have dark background
Dark theme title should be light text
Light theme badge should be blue
Dark theme badge should be cyan

hints.text: Define theme variables on [data-theme] selectors. Component styles reference variables with var(). calc() can multiply a 0-1 progress value to percentage.
Two [data-theme] blocks define colors. Components use var(--primary), var(--bg), etc. The meter uses calc(var(--progress) * 100%) for width.
Define light/dark variable sets, reference them in components, use calc() for dynamic meter width.
